entry.title: IDC W900KK07D0001 (P00130) awarded to RAYTHEON TECHNICAL SERVICES COMPANY LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY (5772), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MOD IS TO:
1. ADD/REVISE VARIOUS CLINS 2. UPDATE APPENDICES B AND C IN SECTION J OF THE CONTRACT 3. UPDATE CLAUSES H.12 AND H.21 TO REFLECT THE CORRECT ACC-ORLANDO STREET ADDRESS AND PERSONNEL 4. CORRECT THE EXTENDED DESCRIPTION OF CLINS 6236, 7236, 8236, AND 9236 TO REFLECT "TO 0607" RATHER THAN "TO 0643"

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
